caseName: Attorney General v. Zambia National Broadcasting Corporation
summary: This case dealt with constitutional interpretation regarding freedom of expression and media regulation.
relevance: Directly addresses constitutional rights and media freedom

caseName: The People v. John Phiri
summary: Leading case on criminal procedure and right to fair trial.
relevance: Establishes principles for due process

caseName: Lusaka City Council v. Ndola Urban District
summary: Dispute over municipal boundaries and administrative jurisdiction.
relevance: Relevant to local government jurisdiction disputes

caseName: Zambia Revenue Authority v. Copper Belt Energy Corp
summary: Taxation dispute over mining royalties and deductible expenses.
relevance: Key authority on mining sector taxation

caseName: Banda v. Zambia Consolidated Copper Mines
summary: Workers' rights case involving wrongful termination and constitutional protections of labour.
relevance: Defines employment rights under the constitution

caseName: First National Bank Zambia v. Mwamba Investments Ltd
summary: Commercial case addressing enforcement of security interests over moveable property.
relevance: Key precedent for secured lending and enforcement

caseName: The People v. Chilufya Mutale
summary: Landmark case on sentencing guidelines for white-collar financial crimes.
relevance: Sentencing precedent for fraud and financial offences

caseName: Zambia National Commercial Bank v. Sikaile Properties
summary: Mortgage enforcement proceedings and rights of a mortgagee in default situations.
relevance: Governs mortgage default and property enforcement

caseName: Nawakwi v. Electoral Commission of Zambia
summary: Electoral petition examining voter eligibility criteria and constitutional rights.
relevance: Addresses electoral law and democratic rights

caseName: Zanaco v. Mukuka & Others
summary: Banking fraud case covering liability of financial institutions for insider transactions.
relevance: Bank liability and internal fraud principles

caseName: Zesco Ltd v. National Energy Regulatory Board
summary: Administrative law case concerning the scope of regulatory authority over utilities.
relevance: Defines limits of regulatory power in the energy sector

caseName: Lungu v. Patriotic Front
summary: Party constitutional dispute over leadership and membership rights.
relevance: Relevant to political party and association law

caseName: The People v. Kabimba & Others
summary: Corruption prosecution affirming the evidentiary standards for anti-corruption cases.
relevance: Sets evidentiary standard in corruption prosecutions

caseName: Citizens Democratic Party v. President of Zambia
summary: Separation of powers dispute concerning executive decrees and parliamentary oversight.
relevance: Separation of powers and executive authority

caseName: Mwanawasa Memorial Hospital v. Ministry of Health
summary: Healthcare funding and constitutional right to health services in public institutions.
relevance: Right to health and public funding obligations

caseName: Konkola Copper Mines v. Environmental Council of Zambia
summary: Environmental law case on liability for industrial pollution affecting local communities.
relevance: Corporate environmental liability precedent

caseName: The People v. Grace Banda
summary: Criminal appeal addressing evidence of digital communications in cybercrime cases.
relevance: Digital evidence admissibility in cybercrime

caseName: Law Association of Zambia v. Attorney General
summary: Challenge to legislation affecting legal professional independence.
relevance: Independence of the legal profession

caseName: Copperbelt University v. Siame
summary: Wrongful dismissal claim by academic staff against a public university.
relevance: Employment law in public educational institutions

caseName: The People v. Emmanuel Mwamba
summary: Defamation and media law case establishing limits of journalistic privilege.
relevance: Journalistic privilege and defamation standards

caseName: Standard Chartered Bank v. Mwale Enterprises
summary: Guarantor liability and enforcement of personal guarantees in commercial lending.
relevance: Guarantor liability in commercial transactions

caseName: Mwangu Foundation v. Immigration Department
summary: Refugee and asylum rights case involving constitutional protection for non-citizens.
relevance: Refugee and asylum rights under the constitution

caseName: The People v. Kapembwa & Associates
summary: Money laundering prosecution addressing tracing of proceeds of crime.
relevance: Proceeds of crime and money laundering law

caseName: National Pension Scheme Authority v. Tembo Ltd
summary: Pension contributions dispute and employer obligations under social security legislation.
relevance: Employer obligations under pension law

caseName: Chipata Town Council v. Zonda Agriculture Ltd
summary: Land use dispute over agricultural zoning and municipal development plans.
relevance: Land use planning and zoning regulations
